title: THMO 3 Pack Ladies Bed Socks with Grips Non Slip Cosy Slipper Socks for Womens
description: THMO Ladies 3 Pack Thermal Slipper Bed Socks Prepare yourself for the cosy embrace of winter with our THMO Slipper Socks. Designed to keep you warm and toasty during the colder months, these slipper socks are your perfect companion for indoor comfort. Crafted with care using a high-quality, heavy bulk acrylic yarn, these socks possess exceptional thermal properties that will keep your feet snug and cosy. The double brushing on the inside is not only designed to maximise warmth by trapping the heat close to your feet but also to create a luxuriously soft and gentle feel. Experience the luxury of a neat hand-linked toe, ensuring a smooth and irritation-free fit. These socks have a turnover top which adds to the comfort. They secure the socks in place, ensuring that the bed socks stay in place throughout the night while also adding some style to the socks. Our THMO Thermal Socks featuring an innovative anti-slip grip. Say goodbye to worries of slipping on hard surfaces like wooden floors or kitchen tiles, as the strategically placed dotted design on the foot of the sock provides excellent traction. Lounge around your home with confidence and comfort. They come in the 3 pair value pack which is not only great value for money but means you’ll have warm socks to last the colder months. The THMO badge is also heat transferred onto the side of the sock. These THMO thermal slipper socks have 3 colours per pack: Black, Purple & Deep Fuchsia, with white dotted grippers. Available in one size Ladies 4-8 UK. They are made from 93% Acrylic, 6% Polyamide & 1% Elastane. They are also safely machine washable. Extra Product Details THMO Slipper Socks 3 Pair Multipack Double Brushed Inner Thick & Warm Hand Linked Toe Turonver Top Value For Money Black, Purple & Fuchsia Ladies One Size 4-8 UK Machine Washable
